headline: How The Story On Ares Commercial Real Estate (ACRE) Is Shifting Around New US$5 Targets
summary: A shift to a US$5 price target for Ares Commercial Real Estate is putting fresh attention on where the shares sit relative to updated fair value views. Analysts tying this target to new mortgage finance estimates after Q4 sector reports are split between seeing the stock as closer to fair value and seeing limited room against sector risks and execution questions. As you read on, you will see how this evolving narrative might shape the way you track the name from here. Analyst Price Targets...

headline: How The Investment Story Is Shifting For Equinor (OB:EQNR) As Analyst Views Diverge
summary: Equinor’s modeled fair value has been revised from NOK 237.91 to NOK 287.31, a change of about 21% in the latest round of analyst updates. Behind this shift, some firms are lifting price targets in both NOK and US$, while others hold to more conservative levels around NOK 214 to NOK 220. This creates a clear split between bullish and cautious views. As you read on, you will see what is driving these differences and how to keep track of the evolving narrative around the stock. Analyst Price...
